textPlain: The sheer volume of life here is incredible. I already know trees to be stewards of life on earth but wasn't aware they had complex inner ecosystems themselves.
Serious question: how could it not?Surely the contribution is cataloging and detailing information about tree microbiomes and not proving that they aren't all identical?
Domain of Science just put out a great new "Map of" video that shows how fungi are up in everything:https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5FqFg-rjzPo
